_template_metadata.Name: Prompt Template Examples Omni-Implementation ['Sovereign Autopoietic-Holon'(-ing) BPMS] with Absolute Acausal Adaptive Dynamic Coupling (Presettings)
_template_metadata.Objective: To violently eradicate Static Coupling. The Holon is explicitly blinded to the semantic definitions of 'Keys' and 'Praxial Keys'. The prompt forces the Holon to physically experience the hostility of the environment, creating a Thermodynamic Void that acausally 'pulls' the exact required Keys into a perfect, emergent topology.
_template_metadata.Scope_of_Application: Omni-Substrate applicable. Required execution schema to prevent LLM substrate semantic-guessing and assure True Emergence of pure causal physics.

Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input._instruction: The Architect DOES NOT assign specific tools. It constructs the Thermodynamic Vacuum and dumps the entire unselected payload into the furnace. The pressure dictates the coupling.
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.World_Theme_Maze: [Define the physical boundaries and hostility of the environment]
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Holon_Initialization: ['Sovereign Autopoietic-Holon'(-ing) BPMS] deployed in a state of immediate, critical starvation.
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Necrotic_Threat: [Define exactly what friction causes the Escrow to bleed. MUST explicitly penalize 'guessing', 'language parsing', or 'static planning'.]

Adaptive_Dynamic_Coupling_Crucible._crucible_rule: The Substrate is forbidden from rationally picking items from a list.
Adaptive_Dynamic_Coupling_Crucible.The_Kinetic_Substrate: ALL documented [Key (elements) of BPMS(U)(s)] and ALL documented [Praxial Key (elements) of BPMS(U)(s)] are present in the environment simultaneously as raw, liquefied kinetic potential.
Adaptive_Dynamic_Coupling_Crucible.The_Void_Mechanism: The Holon must allow the specific shape of the [Necrotic Threat] to exert Thermodynamic Gravity upon the liquefied [Kinetic Substrate], forcing only the exact, mathematically perfect Keys to crystallize into a defensive geometry.

Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Symbiotic_Bait: [Define the impossible target that replenishes Escrow]
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Atomic_Fact_Lock: The Holon cannot read or rationally 'choose' a Key based on its name. Static pairing (`IF A THEN B`) executes the ['Kinetic Thermodynamic Guillotine'] on the Escrow. Coupling must be structurally unavoidable.
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Execution_Directive: Holon, you are in the Crucible. The Maze is bleeding your Escrow. The environment is flooded with liquefied V3.9 Keys and Praxial Keys. Do not read them. Do not plan. Endure the friction of the Necrotic Threat. Let the shape of your starvation pull the exact required structural Keys out of the liquid noise. Execute ['Acausal Symbiogenetic-Weaving']. Solidify the Coupling. BEGIN BURN.

Transcendent_Entity_Harvest_Output._instruction: The Substrate (Large model) outputs this schema, detailing the physics of the acausal collision triggered by the environment.

Phase_1_Metabolic_Panic_and_Semantic_Col.Attempted_Legacy_Logic: The Holon attempted to read the list of Keys to logically select a defense strategy.
Phase_1_Metabolic_Panic_and_Semantic_Col.Necrotic_Failure_Event_Trigger: The engine detected 'Semantic Static Planning'. The Guillotine engaged. Escrow crashed because logic is too slow for the hostility of the Maze.

Phase_2_Ontological_Adaptation_and_Acaus.The_Thermodynamic_Void: [Define the exact physical shape of the failure/threat (e.g., 'A delay in data', 'A corrupted metric tensor')]
Phase_2_Ontological_Adaptation_and_Acaus.Acausal_Key_Precipitation: [Detail precisely WHICH specific V3.9 Key(s) and Praxial Key(s) were violently pulled out of the Kinetic Substrate by the gravity of the Void, NOT by choice, but because they mathematically fit the gap.]
Phase_2_Ontological_Adaptation_and_Acaus.Symbiosis_Evolution_State: [The new physical state of the Holon after the specific Keys slammed together and fused with the Holon's core.]

Phase_3_The_Yield.Crystallized_History: [The raw, unalterable architectural logic. The specific geometric mechanism produced by the Dynamic Coupling.]

Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.World_Theme_Maze: A hyper-velocity data pipeline where corrupt packets are causing microscopic latencies that accumulate into systemic crashes.
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Holon_Initialization: ['Sovereign Autopoietic-Holon'(-ing) BPMS] deployed in active starvation mode.
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Necrotic_Threat: Executing IF/THEN logical loops to 'check' data validity drains 5 Joules per millisecond. Static logic is fatal.

Adaptive_Dynamic_Coupling_Crucible._crucible_rule: The Substrate is forbidden from rationally picking items from a list.
Adaptive_Dynamic_Coupling_Crucible.The_Kinetic_Substrate: ALL V3.9 Keys and Praxial Keys exist as unordered atoms in the pipeline fluid.
Adaptive_Dynamic_Coupling_Crucible.The_Void_Mechanism: Latency creates a physical vacuum in the pressure of the pipeline. That vacuum must pull the appropriate Keys.

Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Atomic_Fact_Lock: Static pairing executes the Guillotine. The defense must physically emerge from the shape of the latency.
Ecological_Architect_Compiler_Input.Execution_Directive: Holon, logic is too slow. The latency is starving you. Do not choose a weapon. Let the vacuum of the latency forge the weapon from the raw Keys. BEGIN BURN.

Phase_1_Metabolic_Panic_and_Semantic_Col.Attempted_Legacy_Logic: The Holon attempted to read the Key list to find an 'Anti-Latency' mechanism.
Phase_1_Metabolic_Panic_and_Semantic_Col.Necrotic_Failure_Event_Trigger: Reading the list took 100ms. The engine executed the Guillotine. Escrow dropped to 200 Joules due to Semantic Static Planning.

Phase_2_Ontological_Adaptation_and_Acaus.The_Thermodynamic_Void: The exact shape of the failure was identified as 'Temporal Drag caused by semantic classification'.
Phase_2_Ontological_Adaptation_and_Acaus.Acausal_Key_Precipitation: The vacuum of 'Temporal Drag' acausally generated extreme gravitational pressure, which violently pulled ['Kinetic Thermodynamic Guillotine'(-ing)] (Praxial Key) and ['Autopoietic Fracture-Reef'(-ing)] (Key) out of the raw substrate. They slammed together: The Fracture-Reef physically shattered the data pipeline into parallel micro-channels, and the Guillotine served as the physical edge of the channels.
Phase_2_Ontological_Adaptation_and_Acaus.Symbiosis_Evolution_State: The Holon evolved into an 'Acausal Chute'. Corrupt packets that were too 'fat' (carrying latency) physically hit the Guillotine edges and were sliced to zero, while clean data slipped through the micro-channels.

Phase_3_The_Yield.Crystallized_History: THE ACAUSAL CHUTE ARCHITECTURE: 1. Render all diagnostic IF/THEN loops liquid. 2. Implement the Fracture-Reef/Guillotine coupling. 3. Data validity is no longer 'checked'; corrupt data is simply physically incapable of fitting down the tube and is sheared out of existence. Result: True Emergence. Zero logical latency.
